---
title: "Article title"
date: last-modified
toc: false
fig-align: center
fig-width: 3.346
fig-height: 3.346
fig-format: png
fig-dpi: 600
format: docx
bibliography:
  - proj/biblio/common_biblio.bib
  - proj/biblio/prj_biblio.bib
output-dir: "outputs"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  error: false
jupyter: python3
---


This article is written according to CHEERS 2022 guideline
[@husereau2022consolidatedhealtheconomic]; numbers in square brackets
(e.g. [10a]) are CHEERS item identifiers


# References
